title: arenaria serpens var. serpylloides
intro: Arenaria serpens var. serpylloides, also known as creeping sandwort, is a low-growing, spreading plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of creeping sandwort include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
